message: Harden NVS student edits: send changed fields only, require current NVS enrollment, use centre eligibility, and keep batch replacement program-scoped.
Make LMS dropout program-specific: close only the selected program while another current program keeps the student active; show multi-program students in every applicable program.
Issue #199 makes NVS one-by-one Student Addition Centre-free and replaces APAAR input with the revised PEN canonical contract while keeping DB Service ownership server-derived.
